title: Sky's PvP Modpack
description: A modpack that has both the functionality of FPS boosting and PVP improvements.
body: The Modpack includes FPS improvements with Mods like Sodium and such, And PvP improvments, this modpack has been made with keeping Sword PVP in mind and if you are interested in any other form of pvp, you can Customize this modpack locally to suit your needs.![Sky's Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a4f878f2bbaa64183d63f59292c500b4ffe4d5_0.webp)
